records.ety: [Gr. <?/ short-drawn breath, fr. <?/ to blow, for <?/: cf. Skr. vā, Goth. waian, to blow, E. wind.]

defs: A disease, characterized by difficulty of breathing (due to a spasmodic contraction of the bronchi), recurring at intervals, accompanied with a wheezing sound, a sense of constriction in the chest, a cough, and expectoration.
